title: Locale route renders hard-coded English copy

evidence.quote:
Network Simulator

Simulate different wallet and network states to see how the UI responds.

reasoning: The page is mounted under the locale segment `/:locale/...` and the project is configured with next-intl, but this route renders all user-facing content directly in English instead of reading locale messages. Non-English locale URLs will therefore serve English-only content, which violates the implied locale route contract and makes this page inconsistent with localized routing.
reproduction: Open any non-English locale variant of `/:locale/learn/network-sim`; the simulator headings, state labels, warnings, and reference table remain English.
recommendation: Move the route copy into next-intl messages and use the existing locale/i18n mechanism in this page or a wrapper component.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests are linked for this feature, and there is no locale rendering assertion for the route.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a route-level render test for at least one non-default locale that asserts translated simulator labels/headings are rendered from message files.
minimumFixScope: Update `frontend/src/app/[locale]/learn/network-sim/page.tsx` and the relevant locale message files for this route.
